properties.name: Marsiling PC
properties.description: Very steep climb near Blk 145. No pedestrian crossing on road junctions especially Street 11. Careful on this PCN.

properties.name: Admiralty PK
properties.description: This path is not all metalled. Some part are pebbled road. Not that accessible by road bikes.

properties.name: Mandai PC
properties.description: This PCN is known to be extremely slippery especially on rainy days. Please ride slow and safe.

properties.name: Ulu Pandan PC
properties.description: This PC goes along the canal most of the way. It is not near roads so access to it from road is limited to a few points.

properties.name: Pandan Gardens PC
properties.description: Dead end near AYE. Not possible to cross over.

properties.name: Changi Pt PC
properties.description: This PC has a number of small steep slopes. Ride with care. Part of RIR

properties.name: PPN Walk
properties.description: Punggol Prominade Natural Walk. Paved metaled road already. There are a few sharp turns. Watch out.

properties.name: Foot Path no cycle
properties.description: Currently shortest foot path to enter WaterFront from LRT. Not a PCN.

properties.name: Unknown path
properties.description: Ends right after Gelang Bahru. Probably will continue in future.

properties.name: Balam PC
properties.description: Probably an extension of Ballam PC

properties.name: Siglap Linear PK
properties.description: There is a Siglap PC already. Not sure what is this route called. Currently isolated route. Can't link to anywhere.

properties.name: Line 111
properties.description: PCN marked on the floor as viewed on Google map

properties.name: Line 132
properties.description: New PCN to avoid Loyang Ave closure

properties.name: Ulu Pandan North PC
properties.description: Partly cement track which is very rough.

properties.name: Line 50
properties.description: Seen across the road did not venture into it.

properties.name: On Road Cycling Path on Both side of road
Line 194
properties.description: Not sure whether PCN but there is a bicycle symbol on the floor at both ends and across Geylang Rd

properties.name: Line 232
properties.description: Not Confirmed but is wide enough.

properties.name: Line 234
properties.description: Dead end on the west end.

properties.name: Admiralty PK
properties.description: This path is not all metalled. Some part are pebbled road. Not that accessible by road bikes.

properties.name: PPN Walk
properties.description: Punggol Prominade Natural Walk. Paved metaled road already. There are a few sharp turns. Watch out. Part of RIR

properties.name: Foot Path no cycle
properties.description: Currently shortest foot path to enter WaterFront from LRT. Not a PCN.

properties.name: Garden by the Park
properties.description: Just  a foot path not PCN

properties.name: Path joining PC with Road
properties.description: The path will lead right up to the front of the building. Push across area and the bridge also.

properties.name: Hill View PK 1
properties.description: Off road trail. Not for road bike

properties.name: Foot Path
properties.description: Push your bike. Part of the path is very narrow near the drain.

properties.name: Labridor Coastal and Nature Walk
properties.description: Foot Path. Push your bike especially near the private estate. The security will ask you to dismount.

properties.name: Clementi Wood PK trail
properties.description: Have to push your bike some of the way.

properties.name: Southern Ridges Trail
properties.description: Some part are on the road while other parts are foot path. You need to push your bike through a number of bridges and path ways.

properties.name: Foot Path
properties.description: Look like PCN but does not have PCN signs. Probably just a wide foot path.

properties.name: Green Corridor
properties.description: Former railway tracks. The route is not continuous. There is no crossing at Hill View and Chua Chu Kang. Alternate route is suggested in red. A much more detailed route access information is available in Google Maps by Thomas. Road is dirt track, some portion is pebble stones. Very muddy during rainy seasons.

properties.name: GC access
properties.description: start the route from Silat Walk

properties.name: Path to Green Corridor
properties.description: Go into Car park then go behind the Worker's Lodge to reach a pedestrian bridge. Follow along the river bank dirt trail to reach the Corridor.

properties.name: City Green Corridor
properties.description: May have to push bike across road junctions

properties.name: Foot Path
properties.description: Push your bike through this foot path and follow the red line back to Loyang Ave. This will avoid the steep slope at Ave 3 and Loyang Way Junction.

properties.name: Path
properties.description: Not Sure whether It is private

properties.name: Foot Path
properties.description: Use the overhead Pedestrian bridge to cross the road.

properties.name: Punggol PK 2
properties.description: On both sides of the canal

properties.name: Line 59
properties.description: Its a road no traffic signs anywhere around

properties.name: Alternate Route
properties.description: Path to go down to Hillview Rd. This one is easier to go but is longer.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: Can cycle across. No  "dismount and push" sign.

properties.name: Alternate Route
properties.description: Suggested by Yu Hsien Chia. A mix of on road and foot path I think.

properties.name: Opened for public access
properties.description: Path is sandy. Road bikes beware.

properties.name: Line 71
properties.description: Foot Path. Please push your bike.

properties.name: Usually in the direction towards Yishun.
Training Route
properties.description: Some part is one way only.

properties.name: Training Route
properties.description: This is a one way road from Kampong Bahru Rd.

properties.name: One way only
properties.description: One way route to Chek Jawa

properties.name: One way from Chek Jawa
properties.description: The route is a bit steep. Push bike if you can't take it.

properties.name: Alternate route from Sembawang to Selatar
Look out for ram
properties.description: There is a ram that goes down. You need to go into the park first.

properties.name: Part of car park
properties.description: This portion is actually a road in the car park.

properties.name: No marking available
properties.description: No clear path across this MRT. Go in front of the MRT. You should push your bikes across it as it is usually crowded.

properties.name: Disjointed route
properties.description: Lookout for a link between the two PCs here.

properties.name: Not for road bikes
properties.description: This point on wards is not suitable for road bikes. It will go totally off road further down.

properties.name: Over Head Bridge
properties.description: Carry your bike across if you don't want to take the longer way. its a four flight stair so it will be tough.

properties.name: Change Lane
properties.description: Ensure no vehicle coming out before quickly crossing the lane.

properties.name: Danger crossing
properties.description: You need to go for a long distance on the third lane just to go straight. Speeding vehicles will horn you like mad if you do so. Waiting to cut through two lanes is practically not workable as the road already turns before you can cross to Lentor Ave.

properties.name: Cross Road
properties.description: Cross the road here to go on the other side of Bukit Panjang Rd.

properties.name: Go under
properties.description: When you hit the road, make a S turn to your right. It will go under the road.

properties.name: Turn here
properties.description: You will see big water pipes in front of you and the foot path turns right (coming from Daily Farm direction).

properties.name: Push bike across
properties.description: Push up a pedestrian bridge then cross the flyover pedestrian crossing go down then turn under the flyover.

properties.name: Very narrow path
properties.description: Probably have to push your bike through this small foot path. Just a few meters length only.

properties.name: Cross the Road
properties.description: Look out for the pedestrian crossing here.

properties.name: Stair Case
properties.description: Carry down stairs your bike. Just a short distance only.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: Go Up on to the bridge but don't cross the waterway. Go straight instead. Go to the side of the bridge to use the PK path.

properties.name: Sunrise Bridge
properties.description: Dismount and push bike over. it seems like the push bike sign has been removed.

properties.name: Attention
properties.description: You need to go down around here to the PCN close to the road then a short distance away go back up to continue below the MRT. It is very confusing.

properties.name: U-turn
properties.description: Go a short distance down then u turn

properties.name: Cut across the building
properties.description: Wide empty space to move through.

properties.name: Beware
properties.description: There is a garbage housing here, the path is very narrow.

properties.name: Alert
properties.description: Look out for vehicle traffic.Exit directly on road. If you come from city area, you need to go a bit down to Vista Exchange Green junction. Push your bike across the road on pedestrian walk before continuing. There is no U turn sign so cycling across is not legal.

properties.name: Under the bridge
properties.description: There is a under tunnel through AYE plus traffic light across Jln Ahmad Ibrahim.

properties.name: Foot Path
properties.description: Can turn Left to push bike on foot path to the tunnel to reach Bird Park. Not sure whether it is designated as PCN

properties.name: Push Across
properties.description: No proper track to cross on bike

properties.name: Alert
properties.description: Cross canal and turn immediately to the PCN next to the canal else you end up on road

properties.name: Underpass
properties.description: Use the underpass. Make a loop to go up to Geylang Rd Bridge crossing.

properties.name: AMK PCN to Punggol
properties.description: Follow PCN track to Yio Chu Kang Road.

properties.name: Pasir Ris PCN Track
properties.description: Pasir Ris PCN track to Loyang Ave.

properties.name: Trail Ends
properties.description: Trail ends here but is not all of Southern Ridges. Malang trail is further down but is foot path only.

properties.name: No Crossing
properties.description: For Green Corridor user. Bridge dismantled. Go by dirt track to by pass.

properties.name: No Crossing
properties.description: Use alternate route on the right or use Pang Sua PC

properties.name: EOR
properties.description: Path is missing after this point. Not possible to cross the river. Another Google Map route author Thomas has a much more specific detail on the route with entry points. Use Google to search for 'Green Corridor'.

properties.name: Carrty bike down slope
properties.description: Very steep slope with no bike access. Need to carry bike on shoulder and climb down the slope. Alternately go to the track on the left of the corridor. Can push bike down.

properties.name: Opening with bridge across
properties.description: Look out for this opening to bring your bike across. The path on the other side is very narrow so is the 'bridge'.

properties.name: Entrance of car park
properties.description: This is the entrance of a heavy vehicle car park. Go straight across till you hit the drain.

properties.name: Dismount and Push across
properties.description: VIP Car Park Entrance. Cannot cycle across unless you do bunny hops.

properties.name: Dismount and push across
properties.description: Another VIP car park entrance. Roadies beware.

properties.name: On Road
properties.description: It is marked as PCN yet it is on the road. Use with care.

properties.name: Cross Road
properties.description: Cross the road if you are on CCK North 5

properties.name: Car Park
properties.description: On road.  This portion is actually part of car park. No markings.

properties.name: Very Narrow
properties.description: It is just a covered drain between hill and abandoned bank, not actually a path.

properties.name: Goes under road
properties.description: Does not join with Henderson PC

properties.name: Goes under road
properties.description: The GC does not join to Alexandra rd. No access from the road.

properties.name: Goes Under Rd
properties.description: May be flooded during raining days

properties.name: Goes Under road
properties.description: GC goes below road. Nice graffiti drawing here.

properties.name: No markings
properties.description: The GC just exit to the road with no markings. Cross the road with care.

properties.name: Warning
properties.description: Pebble stone path with rail tracks. Suggest to push bike over if you are not very skilled.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: Pebble stones with rail track. Be careful. Push bike if you are not skilled.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: For Green Corridor user. Pebbled path with rail tracks. Suggest to push bike across if you are not very skilled.

properties.name: Exit to road with no marking
Exit to road with no marking
Warning
properties.description: Cycle unfriendly. Push your bike across drain.

properties.name: Exit to road with no warning
Alert
properties.description: Very steep gradients on both ends on this section of the PC near the turns. For weaker cyclists, suggest to get down and push your bike.

properties.name: Spiral overhead Bridge
properties.description: First overhead bridge that could be officially cycled across.

properties.name: Warning
properties.description: Very wide road with no pedestrian crossing. Cross with extreme care.

properties.name: No Right Turn
properties.description: If you come from Pasir Ris, there is no right turn. Go straight instead.

properties.name: Note
properties.description: If you are going to Ford road from ECP, you need to push your bike along E Coast Park Service Rd to Ford Road. Go south first and make a U turn further down before going towards Geylang. East Coast Park Service Rd is now one way only .

properties.name: Note
properties.description: No clear marking to cross the MRT station. Use the cycling track to go around instead.

properties.name: Warning
properties.description: The path leading to this part of the road has a very short but steep gradient. Be extra careful.

properties.name: Dead End
properties.description: Quite difficult to go on to the road.

properties.name: Stop Look Go
properties.description: Due to construction, the view is blocked. Cross with care.

properties.name: Note
properties.description: The actual PC is after the canal not the footpath

properties.name: No Cycling
properties.description: The private estate security will ask you to dismpunt

properties.name: Whole road is one way
properties.description: From Kampong Bahru Rd to Mt Faber only

properties.name: One way to North from here
Make U Turn here
properties.description: If you come from East, make U turn here to go into PCN

properties.name: Cycle across
properties.description: Second bridge that you can cycle across

properties.name: Stairs
properties.description: Carry your bike up/down to Merdeka Bridge

properties.name: Under pass
properties.description: The bridge is above head.  Both side have rams to push bike up.

properties.name: Lookout for bus exiting
properties.description: Bus lane on the left. You are on second lane thereafter. (Going towards Yishun)

properties.name: Under pass
properties.description: Foot path. Push your bike across.

properties.name: No Entry
properties.description: Bicycles have to park here. Chek Jawa is strictly pedestrians only.

properties.name: Danger
properties.description: Be very careful at this point.

properties.name: Park Bike here
properties.description: No bicycle allowered in Check Jawa

properties.name: PCN blocked during F1 season
properties.description: Please note that during F1 season, this portion of the cycling path may be blocked by the F1 organizer. Please use the foot path close to the break water. The foot path is for pedestrians and joggers. Please be considerate.

properties.name: Push Bike up the ramp
properties.description: Path up to Braddell Road South side is not for cycling.

properties.name: Test Track
properties.description: The test track consists of segments made of four different materials: Binded Fine Gravel, Cemented Aggregate, Grass & Fine Gravel and Glow in the Dark.

properties.name: East Coast Cycling Park
properties.description: New park that replace the whole Google structure that is in the background. Google has yet to update its map.

properties.name: No cycling beyond this point
properties.description: Although still marked as part of PCN but there is a sign says no cycling moreover it is over a drain so its noisy if you cycle anyway.

properties.name: End?
properties.description: Just a bicycle mark but seems to lead to nowhere.

properties.name: Avoid going under road
properties.description: Go across river from here. Once you see the colorful Old Hill Street Police Station, go up instead of going under.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: Its a very colorful bridge. You won't miss it.

properties.name: Bridge
properties.description: On the East bank there is a 'Kim Seng Park" signboard to the right if you come from city. If you come from Alexandra PC, it is the first bridge.

properties.name: Barriers
properties.description: There are usually barriers here and a 'No Entry' sign. Just find an opening nearest to building to cut through since it is designated a "RIR".. There is supposed to be an opening in the barrier but sometimes they forgot to make one.

properties.name: Note
properties.description: You might be able to cycle straight through and go up to Bayfront Ave via the Youth Olympic Park. If you come from Bayfront Ave. just peek at the path below to see if it is blocked due to events.

properties.name: Danger
properties.description: If you are going down from the bridge, slow down. There is a depression of at least 3-5cm at the end of the bridge.

properties.name: Watch out
properties.description: Fast cyclist turning in from Service Rd.

properties.name: Danger
properties.description: If you are cycling on footpath, beware of a road level drop at this point. Courtesy of Bike Guru.

properties.name: Under Construction
properties.description: Use Ulu Pandan North PC instead.

properties.name: Big Trucks
properties.description: Dusty with big trucks at high speed

properties.name: Not advisable to use this section
properties.description: You have to go on third lane meanwhile lots of vehicles pass you on both sides to go to SLE

properties.name: Need skill and tactics to cross
properties.description: SLE exit with high speed vehicles coming out

properties.name: Keep an eye on vehicles
properties.description: vehicles will ignore you. They come out of side roads as they like. The road is narrow.

properties.name: Very heavy traffic.
properties.description: Avoid. Use PCN to get part of the way if needed.

properties.name: Heavy traffic
properties.description: Although it is a popular exercise route, you need to be very skillful to use it. The PCN is also very slippery.

properties.name: Major Transport road
properties.description: Big trucks, construction, fast vehicles. Just be careful

properties.name: Congested road
properties.description: Jay Parking, Lots of vehicles. Jams at times.

properties.name: Danger spots
properties.description: Fast vehicle in and out of express.

properties.name: Fast vehicle in and out of express.
Boon Bike Supply Pte Ltd
properties.description: 53 Ubi Avenue 1, #05-25 Paya Ubi Industrial Park, Singapore 408934

properties.name: Yong Hin Chan Co
properties.description: Block 510, Off Ave 2, #01-41, Bedok North Street 3, Singapore 460510

properties.name: S3 Cycle
properties.description: B1-27, Punggol Plaza, 168 Punggol Field, Singapore 820168

properties.name: Two Wheel Action Pte Ltd - Holland Grove Road
SG Bike City - Electric and Folding Bicycles
Trikes N Bikes LLP
properties.description: #02-164 IMM Building, 21 Jurong East Street 21, Singapore 609601

properties.name: Thong Chuan Impex Pte Ltd - Aljunied Road
AEZOOM BICYCLES - BEGASSO SG TEAM (Mountain Bikes/Folding Bikes/Kid Bikes)
Mighty Velo - The Folding Bike Specialist
Cycle 21 Pte Ltd - Bicycle Shop / Servicing
FBS Freddy Bicycle Services and Repairs
Bike Republic @Beach Road - Folding Bike Store
